title: 2pk Buzz Cleaning Pad, Dual Sided Scouring Pads Non Scratch for Washing Up, Reusable Scourers Non Scratch for Bathroom, Sink, Dishes & Pots, Multipurpose Washable Kitchen Scourers for Everyday Use
features: Dual-Sided for Maximum Efficiency – Features a microfiber weft side for gentle cleaning and an abrasive layer for tougher messes, perfect for scouring pads non scratch and kitchen scourers non scratch tasks
Scratch-Free Scrubbing Power – Designed to tackle stubborn grime without damaging surfaces, ideal for use as non scratch scourers, scrubbing pads, and sponge scourers for daily dishwashing needs

Ergonomic & Lightweight Design – Sized at 19x9.5x2cm and weighing just 20g, these scrub pads provide a comfortable hold for extended cleaning—ideal for kitchen scrubber, pan scourers, or bathroom sponges cleaning
Vibrant Colour Design – Features pink shades to help organise your sponge usage by area—perfect for kitchen cleaning sponges, bathroom sponges cleaning or dishwashing sponge routines

description: Product Description Previous page Next page YOUR EVERYDAY CLEANING COMPANION 2pk Buzz Cleaning Pad Add To Basket 2pk Super Cleaning Clay Add To Basket Heavy Duty Silicone Add To Basket 2pk Ultra Thirsty Sponge Buying Options 27pk Liquid Refill Add To Basket 6pk Scour Sponges Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 1 3.0 out of 5 stars 10 3.5 out of 5 stars 51 4.5 out of 5 stars 678 2.4 out of 5 stars 67 3.2 out of 5 stars 13 Price £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £4.79 £ 4 . 79 — £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 NON-SCRATCH ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ REUSABLE & WASHABLE ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ MULTIPURPOSE CLEANING ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ MULTISURFACE ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ MULTIPACK ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What surfaces can the dual-sided cleaning pads be used on? They work on sinks, dishes, pots, kitchen counters, bathroom surfaces and more. The non scratch design makes them versatile for daily washing up and scrubbing. Are these cleaning pads easy to maintain after use? Yes, simply rinse thoroughly after each use and allow to air dry. The durable material helps maintain performance over multiple cleaning tasks without breaking down. How do the dual sides of the pad function during cleaning? The microfibre side handles light wiping, while the abrasive side tackles stubborn grime, making them ideal for multiple household cleaning tasks. Can these pads be used for both kitchen and bathroom cleaning? Absolutely. The colour design allows you to assign pads for specific areas, keeping your kitchen and bathroom cleaning routines organised and efficient. Are these pads suitable for delicate items like non-stick cookware? Yes, the non scratch surface makes them safe for non-stick pans, glass, ceramic and other sensitive surfaces, helping protect your cookware.
